rules.message: A feature ('${file.module}') must not import from another feature ('${dependency.module}'). Share via lib/ or the api/domain layer (skill §2.4).
Shared code (components/lib/providers) must not depend on a feature (skill §2.4).

patterns.message: Only src/lib/api/ may import the generated client. Features must use the configured apiClient / their module api binding (skill §2.4, §3).

no-restricted-globals.name: localStorage
no-restricted-globals.message: Auth tokens must live in httpOnly cookies via the BFF — never localStorage (ADR-0003 F5).

no-restricted-globals.name: sessionStorage
no-restricted-globals.message: Auth tokens must live in httpOnly cookies via the BFF — never sessionStorage (ADR-0003 F5).

no-restricted-syntax.message: No raw hex colours in app code — use a design-token utility (bg-primary, text-muted-foreground, border-strong, bg-success-soft, …) or add a token in src/styles/tokens.css. The design system is the source of truth; scattering hex is how screens drift from the design (nextjs-author §8, design-system.md). The /design gallery is exempt.
No raw hex colours in app code — use a design-token utility or add a token in src/styles/tokens.css (nextjs-author §8). The /design gallery is exempt.
